connectors.name: Gmail
connectors.description: Google's email service. Search inboxes, send/reply/draft messages, manage labels and threads.

connectors.name: Google Calendar
connectors.description: Time management and scheduling. Create/update/list events, manage calendars and attendees.

connectors.name: Outlook
connectors.description: Microsoft's email and calendaring platform. Manage mail, contacts, calendars and rules.

connectors.name: Notion
connectors.description: Workspace for docs, wikis and databases. Search, read, create and update pages and database items.

connectors.name: Linear
connectors.description: Issue tracking and project management for software teams. Create, query and update issues, projects and cycles.

connectors.name: GitHub
connectors.description: Code hosting and collaboration. Manage repos, issues, pull requests, branches and reviews.

connectors.name: Google Drive
connectors.description: Cloud file storage. Search, upload, share and manage files, folders and permissions.

connectors.name: SharePoint
connectors.description: Microsoft document management and intranet platform. Search and manage sites, lists and files.

connectors.name: OneDrive
connectors.description: Microsoft cloud file storage. Upload, share and manage personal/business files and folders.

connectors.name: Slack
connectors.description: Channel-based team messaging. Search history, post messages, manage channels and users.

connectors.name: Box
connectors.description: Enterprise cloud content management. Manage files, folders, sharing and collaboration.

connectors.name: Dropbox
connectors.description: Cloud file syncing and sharing. Upload, list, move and share files across devices.

connectors.name: HubSpot
connectors.description: CRM and marketing platform. Manage contacts, companies, deals, tickets and engagements.

connectors.name: Jira
connectors.description: Atlassian issue and project tracking. Create/search/update tickets, manage sprints and boards.

connectors.name: Confluence
connectors.description: Atlassian knowledge base and team wiki. Search, create and edit pages and spaces.

connectors.name: Asana
connectors.description: Task and project management. Create/update tasks, projects, sections and assignments.

connectors.name: Databricks
connectors.description: Unified analytics and lakehouse platform. Run SQL/jobs, manage clusters, notebooks and Unity Catalog.

connectors.name: Snowflake
connectors.description: Cloud data warehouse. Query structured data, manage warehouses, databases and roles.

connectors.name: Salesforce
connectors.description: Enterprise CRM. Manage leads, accounts, opportunities, cases and custom objects.

connectors.name: ServiceNow
connectors.description: IT service management platform. Manage incidents, change requests, knowledge base and CMDB.

connectors.name: Microsoft Teams
connectors.description: Microsoft collaboration platform. Send messages, manage channels, teams and meetings.

connectors.name: Zapier
connectors.description: Not available as a Composio toolkit — Zapier is a direct competitor to Composio's integration platform.

connectors.name: Make.com
connectors.description: Not available as a Composio toolkit — Make (formerly Integromat) is a direct competitor.

connectors.name: Google Workspace
connectors.description: Not a single Composio toolkit. Use the individual Google toolkits instead: gmail, googledrive, googlecalendar, googledocs, googlesheets, etc.

connectors.name: Custom Remote MCPs
connectors.description: Not applicable — Composio is itself an MCP gateway. Custom MCPs are handled via Composio's auth-config/integration system or by registering a custom toolkit.
